generated_oml:
instance MABIMAX100PositionEncoders : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Encoders for position sensing across all six axes of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MABIMAX100PositionData
]

instance MABIMAX100PositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MABIMAX100PositionEncoders
    base:desc "Time series sensor data streamed via MQTT protocol from physical robot encoders"
]

instance MABIMAX100PositionDataStream : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Streamed sensor time series data from physical robot encoders"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MABIMAX100PositionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, CppEnabler, JavaEnabler
]

instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink for analytical simulations"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance CppEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ programming language for code implementation"
    DTDFVocab:enables CodeImplementationService
]

instance JavaEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Java programming language for code implementation"
    DTDFVocab:enables CodeImplementationService
]

instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for systems engineering modeling across multiple abstraction levels"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelManagementService
]

instance ACMEEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ACME Architecture Description Language for component & connector structures"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComponentStructureService
]

instance AADLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "AADL Architecture Description Language for component & connector structures"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComponentStructureService
]

instance MontiArcEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MontiArc Architecture Description Language for component & connector structures"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComponentStructureService
]

instance SysMLIBDEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML Interface Block Diagrams for component & connector structures"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComponentStructureService
]

instance MontiArcAutomatonEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MontiArc Automaton for behavior modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables BehaviorModelingService
]

instance SysMLStateMachineEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML v1.7 state machines for behavior modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables BehaviorModelingService
]

instance RFLPEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RFLP methodology for layered abstraction (Requirements, Functions, Logics, Physics)"
    DTDFVocab:enables LayeredAbstractionService
]

instance OOSEMEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "OOSEM methodology for system complexity management"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComplexityManagementService
]

instance SPESEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SPES methodology for layered abstraction"
    DTDFVocab:enables LayeredAbstractionService
]

instance SMArDTEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SMArDT methodology for layered abstraction"
    DTDFVocab:enables LayeredAbstractionService
]

instance RequirementsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [

]

instance FunctionalArchitectureModel : DTDFVocab:Model [

instance LogicalArchitectureModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML model for logical architecture layer"

instance ProductTechnicalLayerModel : DTDFVocab:Model [

]

instance SysMLStateMachineModel : DTDFVocab:Model [

instance MABIMAX100PhysicalSystem : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Serial robot MABI MAX 100 with six axes, comprising motors, gearboxes, encoders for position sensing, and controlled by Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl controller"
]

instance MABIMAX100Environment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical environment of the MABI MAX 100 robot system"
    base:contains MABIMAX100PhysicalSystem
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Shadow Reference Model and Concrete Digital Shadow Model are described in the document, with the former being a UML class diagram (Fig. 1) defining key concepts for digital shadows in manufacturing, including contextual data traces, aggregation, and abstraction. The Concrete Digital Shadow Model details specific architecture patterns, component integration, and coordination mechanisms for implementation."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system's lifecycle phases are structured using Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE) methodologies such as RFLP (Requirements, Functions, Logics, Physics), OOSEM, SPES, and SMArDT, which define distinct abstraction levels including requirements analysis, functional architecture design, logical architecture modeling, and product/technical implementation. Transition between stages is managed through consistent model integration and stakeholder collaboration, as referenced in [31]."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication protocol is MQTT for streaming sensor time series data from physical assets, as specified in the document: 'We have access to time series of all sensors, which are streamed via MQTT'."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) are implemented for data modeling, with data streamed via MQTT protocol for visualization in a dashboard."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system complies with industry standards including SysML [17] for system modeling, ACME [23], AADL [24], and MontiArc [25], [26] for architecture description, ensuring interoperability and component-based representation across system layers."
]
